Visible branding, version, render date and duration removed from full-document output; provenance kept only in meta generator tag; bare output unchanged. PR #22 (v0.6/pr2-quiet-output).
Full-document output shows 'Source modified:' with machine-readable <time datetime> from filesystem mtime only; omitted (render still succeeds) when mtime unavailable; absent in bare output. PR #22.

Toggle kept (OS detection, manual toggle, persistence) and improved: aria-label, keyboard accessible button, try/catch localStorage for file:// pages, reserved narrow-screen padding, print-hidden, restylable/hidable via #theme-toggle from --css. PR #22.

Implemented mdo --verbose end-to-end timing diagnostics: per-stage (read, markdown, sanitize, assemble, write) + total wall-clock timings to stderr only; HTML byte-identical with/without the flag; browser-launch initiation reported separately for --open. Draft PR https://github.com/maphew/mdo/pull/23

Owned-state check shipped in PR #24: setup detects mdo's own handler registration (HKCU mdo.md ProgID command on Windows, mdo.desktop in XDG applications on Linux), offers leave-unchanged (default) or reinstall; install stays idempotent, uninstall touches only mdo-owned resources; unit tests cover detection and prompt logic without registry mutation.

ADR 0004 marked Deferred in PR #24 with the stated rationale; deferral section distinguishes the minimal v0.6 owned-registration check from the deferred full manager and explicitly does not authorize comprehensive partial-state recovery.

README rewritten as short Open-Markdown-as-HTML landing page (headline, one-paragraph explanation, install, three essential commands, prominent file-manager integration, security note, preserved feedback section, doc links) in PR #25

Detailed guidance moved to docs/usage.md, docs/file-manager-integration.md, docs/custom-css.md, docs/maintaining.md; docs/index.md updated and generated pages (index.html, sample.html, README.html) regenerated with the branch binary in PR #25
